name: Banana Cake
recipeIngredient: 9 mashed bananas (about 3/4 cup mashed from each banana)
1/2 cup milk mixed with the bananas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together eggs, sugar, Crisco, sour cream, and bananas until well combined.
2. Add flour, baking soda, and vanilla to the mixture; stir until just combined. Mix in milk blended with bananas.
3. Pour batter into a greased Bundt pan.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
5. For the icing: In another bowl, mix softened butter, remaining mashed bananas, powdered sugar, and nuts until smooth.
This recipe yields a moist banana cake with a golden crust, perfect for serving at gatherings or enjoying any day as a comforting treat.
